ndi.label: Neighborhood Deprivation Index (NDI)
ndi.description: Composite measure of neighborhood-level socioeconomic deprivation from US Census ACS variables.

walkability.label: EPA Walkability Index
walkability.description: EPA National Walkability Index ranking neighborhoods on walkability characteristics (intersection density, transit proximity, employment mix).

cbp_zcta5.label: Community Organization Density (ZBP)
cbp_zcta5.description: Per-capita density of 10 community organization categories (religious, civic, business, political, professional, labor, bowling, recreational, golf, sports) at the ZIP Code Tabulation Area level from Census Zip Business Patterns.

tiger_proximity.label: TIGER Road Proximity
tiger_proximity.description: Per-residence annual distance (meters) to the nearest TIGER/Line primary road (S1100), secondary road (S1200), and primary+secondary combined, from US Census TIGER/Line shapefiles. Computed at each address, not aggregated to a Census area.

nhd_bluespace.label: NHD Bluespace (water-body distance)
nhd_bluespace.description: Per-residence static distance (meters) to the nearest NHD flowline (dist_flow_m), waterbody (dist_water_m), area-feature (dist_area_m), coastline (dist_coast_m; 99999 for inland addresses), and combined blue-feature (dist_blue_m), from NHDPlus_H National Release 2 GDB (static product, 2024 vintage). Computed at each address, not aggregated to a Census area.

noise.label: BTS Transportation Noise (L50 dBA)
noise.description: Per-residence static daytime road+aviation noise exposure in L50 dBA (existing/imp/nat scenarios) sampled from the US DOT BTS Transportation Noise CONUS raster (270 m grid, static product). l50dba_exi is the existing-conditions surface; l50dba_imp and l50dba_nat are alternative-scenario surfaces.
noise.data_source: US DOT BTS National Transportation Noise Map

vnl.label: VIIRS Night-time Lights (VNL)
vnl.description: Per-residence annual mean radiance sampled from the NOAA VIIRS Day/Night Band Nighttime Lights global v21 product (270 m grid, gridded raster linkage). Single value column 'value' carries the annual masked composite radiance in nanowatts/cm^2/sr.
vnl.data_source: NOAA VIIRS Day/Night Band Nighttime Lights (VNL v21)

temis.label: TEMIS UV Exposure
temis.description: Per-residence annual mean daily UV exposure sampled from KNMI TEMIS UV products (270 m grid, daily raster, gridded linkage). Four value columns: uvddc (daily DNA-damage UV dose), uvdec (daily erythemal UV dose), uvdvc (daily vitamin-D UV dose), uvief (UV index at noon).

fara_tract.label: FARA Food Access (Tract)
fara_tract.description: Per-tract annual USDA FARA food-access indicators (binary flags + share variables, interpolated 2013-2019). Headline value_cols: LILATracts_1And10 (low-income+low-access urban-1mi/rural-10mi), LATracts1 (low-access 1 mile), HUNVFlag (low-vehicle-access), LowIncomeTracts. Full label set in varnameCountRemoved.csv.
